login.title: Log in to LanEntrance
login.description: Sign in with your LanCore account to continue
login.layoutDescription: Enter your email and password below to log in

register.layoutDescription: Enter your details below to create your account
register.name: Name

forgotPassword.layoutDescription: Enter your email to receive a password reset link

resetPassword.layoutDescription: Please enter your new password below

authCode.title: Authentication code
authCode.description: Enter the authentication code provided by your authenticator application.

recoveryCode.title: Recovery code
recoveryCode.description: Please confirm access to your account by entering one of your emergency recovery codes.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email address
verifyEmail.description: Thanks for signing up! Please verify your email to continue.
verifyEmail.linkSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

confirmPassword.title: Confirm your password
confirmPassword.description: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.

ssoStatus.title: Signing you in...
ssoStatus.description: We are completing the LanCore sign-in flow.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account settings and preferences

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Your profile is managed in LanCore
profile.infoDescription: Update your name and email address
profile.name: Name
profile.resendVerification: Click here to resend the verification email.
profile.verificationLinkSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

security.passwordDescription: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure
security.twoFactorDisabledInfo: When you enable two-factor authentication, you will be prompted for a secure pin during login. This pin can be retrieved from a TOTP-supported application on your phone.
security.twoFactorEnabledInfo: You will be prompted for a secure, random pin during login, which you can retrieve from the TOTP-supported application on your phone.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Delete your account and all of its resources
deleteAccount.warningMessage: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.dialogTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deleteAccount.dialogDescription: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

language.managedInLanCore: Change your language in your LanCore profile.

landing.title: Welcome to LanEntrance
landing.subtitle: Fast, on-site ticket check-in for your LAN events.
landing.hero: Fast, smooth check-in for every attendee.
landing.heroDescription: LanEntrance handles event entry — scan tickets, verify identities, and track attendance. Get people through the door and into the action.

scanning.title: Ticket scanning
scanning.description: Scan QR codes or look up tickets manually. Validate in seconds.

attendance.title: Attendance tracking
attendance.description: See who's checked in, who's pending, and real-time headcounts.

sso.title: LanCore SSO
sso.description: Staff authenticate via LanCore. Roles and permissions synced automatically.

landing.footer: Powered by LanEntrance — Part of the Lan-Software ecosystem

scanner.title: Scanner
scanner.description: Scan ticket QR codes to check attendees in.
scanner.cameraRequest: Allow camera access to begin scanning.

lookup.title: Ticket lookup
lookup.description: Find a ticket by name, email, or ticket code.
lookup.searchHintMin: Type at least 2 characters to start searching. You can also enter a validation token directly using the {link} option below.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Check-in statistics for the current event

events.title: Select event
events.description: Choose the event to work with

override.title: Override
override.description: Provide a reason for overriding the restriction for {attendee}.

errors.NotAllowedError: Camera permission was denied. Please allow camera access in your browser settings.
errors.NotFoundError: No camera found on this device.
errors.NotSupportedError: Secure connection (HTTPS) required for camera access.
errors.NotReadableError: Camera is in use by another application.
errors.StreamApiNotSupportedError: Your browser does not support camera streaming.

queuedScans.title: Queued Scans ({count})
queuedScans.pendingMessage: Pending scans will retry automatically when connectivity is restored

degraded.message: Reduced connectivity — results may be delayed or unavailable

recoveryCodes.title: 2FA recovery codes
recoveryCodes.description: Recovery codes let you regain access if you lose your 2FA device. Store them in a secure password manager.
recoveryCodes.usageNote: Each recovery code can be used once to access your account and will be removed after use. If you need more, click {regenerateLink} above.

enabled.title: Two-factor authentication enabled
enabled.description: Two-factor authentication is now enabled. Scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app.

verify.title: Verify authentication code
verify.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app

initial.title: Enable two-factor authentication
initial.description: To finish enabling two-factor authentication, scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.maxLength: Must be no more than {max} characters
